description_long: This is a robust, heavy-duty hammer with a metallic head and a cylindrical handle. The head is large and cylindrical, featuring a flat striking face on one side and a slightly domed or pointed end on the opposite side, suggesting it is a sledgehammer or engineer's hammer. The metallic head is secured with visible rivets or bolts around its circumference, adding to its industrial appearance. The handle is straight, appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, and is capped with a darker grip section at the bottom for improved handling. The overall finish of the hammer is smooth and metallic, with a slight sheen indicating a polished surface. There are no visible signs of branding, wear, or additional attachments.
description: A heavy-duty metallic hammer with a cylindrical head and a straight, dark-handled grip, featuring a smooth, polished finish and industrial rivets.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical metallic head with rivets and the straight handle with a dark grip.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flat striking face of the hammer head and the handle directly behind it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the domed or pointed end of the hammer head and the handle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded or pointed end of the hammer head and the handle extending downward.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a dark, smooth grip section at the bottom, likely for enhanced handling.
attribute_head_type: Large cylindrical steel head with a flat striking face on one side and a domed or pointed end on the other, secured with visible rivets.
